name: MacBook Pro 16-inch, Intel Core i7/i9 (2019)
_note: Memory varies (16/32/64 GB). The preset's memory_gb is null so the memory assert is skipped. Clone this file and pin memory_gb to your specific config (16, 32, or 64) for a hard assert. The M5 calibration is reused as a placeholder until an Intel-era calibration is added; different defect classes apply (T2 issues, butterfly-keyboard 2018-19, GPU stutter 2019).
